hooks.prompt:
Before finishing, check if any code files were modified during this session (Write/Edit/Bash tools). If code was modified:
1. Run `linthis -i <file1> -i <file2> -c` on all modified files to check for lint issues
2. If issues are found, fix them yourself by editing the code directly (do NOT use `linthis --fix` or `linthis fix`)
3. Re-run `linthis -i <files> -c` to confirm all issues are resolved
4. Only approve stopping once lint passes with no errors

If no code files were modified, approve stopping immediately.

[Plugin: linthis-plugin-template]
